title: Baking with Grandma
synopsis: A rainy afternoon becomes warm and happy when a child helps Grandma bake a cake.
sentences: Rain tapped against the kitchen window all afternoon.
Sofia thought the day would be dull until Grandma opened a recipe book.
"Let's bake a cake," Grandma said with a smile.
Sofia put on an apron that was too big for her.
She measured flour while Grandma cracked eggs into a bowl.
The butter was soft, and the sugar looked like tiny white snow.
Sofia stirred carefully, but a little flour still landed on the table.
Grandma laughed and said every good baker makes a mess sometimes.
When the cake went into the oven, the kitchen became quiet again.
Soon a sweet smell filled the room and made both of them hungry.
After the cake cooled, they ate warm slices with tea and milk.
By evening, the rainy day had become one of Sofia's favorites.
